coreTeam.name: Rithin Laxman Kancha
coreTeam.bio: Corporate real estate and project management industry experience — business development, strategic direction, and execution-driven growth.

coreTeam.name: Sowmya Kancha
coreTeam.bio: Procurement mastery, vendor governance, and financial controls across multi-crore fit-out programmes.

coreTeam.name: Surya Devara Kancha
coreTeam.bio: On-ground execution leadership — site teams, schedule control, and quality assurance across active programmes.

timeline.title: Legacy Roots
timeline.text: The late Shri Kancha Laxmaiah Mudiraj establishes a respected presence in Hyderabad's development landscape — plotted developments, land transformation, and early urban expansion across the western corridor.

timeline.title: KLM Homes Pvt Ltd
timeline.text: Founded in 2003, building capability across construction, infrastructure, and project execution.

timeline.title: Aditi Housing and Constructions
timeline.text: Founded in 2018, expanding group capability across construction and infrastructure delivery.
tags: Aditi Housing and Constructions Pvt Ltd

timeline.title: Surya Devara Infrastructures
timeline.text: Rebranded as Surya Devara Infrastructures Pvt Ltd — strengthened infrastructure and execution platform.

timeline.title: Vencore Design Co.
timeline.text: The evolved design-forward arm — architecture, interiors, and turnkey project delivery under one accountable leadership desk.
